title.subtitle: mm — darker colour indicates heavier rainfall

transform.calculate: datum.month_num == 0 ? 'Jan' : datum.month_num == 1 ? 'Feb' : datum.month_num == 2 ? 'Mar' : datum.month_num == 3 ? 'Apr' : datum.month_num == 4 ? 'May' : datum.month_num == 5 ?
